_meta.description: Rare Candy locations per game. EDIT THIS FILE to add your verified entries.

schema.perGame: Game key -> array of { location, notes, source }
schema.location: Where to find it (e.g. 'Cerulean Cave 1F NE corner')

_meta.verificationReminder: Verify every entry against your cartridge before relying on it for the tournament.

crystal.notes: Post-game Kanto. Multiple candies hidden across the cave's three floors.
Hidden inside the cave system between Ecruteak and Mahogany. Requires Surf and Strength.
Hidden item inside the cave. Endgame only — accessible after defeating the Elite Four.

emerald.notes: Hidden item near the top of the outdoor section of Mt. Pyre.
Found within Sky Pillar, accessible during/after the Rayquaza event.

firered.notes: Post-game cave on Cerulean City's north side. Multiple candies on different floors.
Cinnabar Island. Hidden item on one of the upper floors.
